A Developer's Discovery
🎬
I Installed DaVinci Resolve on Linux.
Here's Every Wall I Hit.
Ubuntu 24.04 + Wayland + NVIDIA.
With Claude as my copilot.
Ubuntu 24.04 Wayland NVIDIA Claude DaVinci Resolve
Lim Chun Zhe
01 / 08
``` - [ ] **Step 2: Visual check via Playwright** Use Playwright MCP `browser_navigate` to the URL, then `browser_take_screenshot`. Verify: - Film frame visible with sprocket holes - Title is 68px, readable - Tags visible with distinct colors - Gradient background visible - Author tag and slide number positioned correctly
